tool_calls.name: explain_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT repo, COUNT(*) as count, MAX(additions) as max_additions FROM github_pull_requests WHERE state = 'open' AND additions > 400 AND closes_linear IS NULL GROUP BY repo ORDER BY max_additions DESC LIMIT 1"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT number FROM github_pull_requests WHERE state = 'open' AND additions > 400 AND closes_linear IS NULL ORDER BY additions DESC LIMIT 1"}
